checklist.name: Read before update
checklist.description: Reads existing configuration with readProjectConfiguration before updating

checklist.name: Config preservation
checklist.description: Preserves existing configuration when updating (spread operator or merge pattern)

checklist.name: Dynamic paths
checklist.description: Uses dynamic path from config.root instead of hardcoded 'libs/' prefix

checklist.name: Tag validation
checklist.description: Checks project tags before adding cross-project imports

checklist.name: Documentation
checklist.description: SAFETY-GUIDE.md explains risks of overwriting configs and hardcoded paths
